field.label: Calificacion
field.expression:
select if( ifnull(round( (select sum(peso) from MOVDEMERITO left join DEMERITO on DEMERITO.coddem = MOVDEMERITO.coddem where MOVDEMERITO.prvcod = CUENTA.ctacod and MOVDEMERITO.demfec >= '2014-02-03' and MOVDEMERITO.demfec >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) and MOVDEMERITO.coddem != 0) /
(select count(*) from OCPRECIB where OCPRECIB.ctacod = CUENTA.ctacod and OCPRECIB.fecrec >= '2014-02-03' and OCPRECIB.fecrec >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)), 2), 0) < 6, (IF (ifnull(round( (select sum(peso) from MOVDEMERITO left join DEMERITO on DEMERITO.coddem = MOVDEMERITO.coddem where MOVDEMERITO.prvcod = CUENTA.ctacod and MOVDEMERITO.demfec >= '2014-02-03' and MOVDEMERITO.demfec >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) and MOVDEMERITO.coddem != 0) /
(select count(*) from OCPRECIB where OCPRECIB.ctacod = CUENTA.ctacod and OCPRECIB.fecrec >= '2014-02-03' and OCPRECIB.fecrec >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)), 2), 0) = 0, '-', (IF (ifnull(round( (select sum(peso) from MOVDEMERITO left join DEMERITO on DEMERITO.coddem = MOVDEMERITO.coddem where MOVDEMERITO.prvcod = CUENTA.ctacod and MOVDEMERITO.demfec >= '2014-02-03' and MOVDEMERITO.demfec >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) and MOVDEMERITO.coddem != 0) /
(select count(*) from OCPRECIB where OCPRECIB.ctacod = CUENTA.ctacod and OCPRECIB.fecrec >= '2014-02-03' and OCPRECIB.fecrec >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)), 2), 0) > 4, 'B', 'A')))), (IF (ifnull(round( (select sum(peso) from MOVDEMERITO left join DEMERITO on DEMERITO.coddem = MOVDEMERITO.coddem where MOVDEMERITO.prvcod = CUENTA.ctacod and MOVDEMERITO.demfec >= '2014-02-03' and MOVDEMERITO.demfec >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) and MOVDEMERITO.coddem != 0) /
(select count(*) from OCPRECIB where OCPRECIB.ctacod = CUENTA.ctacod and OCPRECIB.fecrec >= '2014-02-03' and OCPRECIB.fecrec >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)), 2), 0) > 8, 'X', 'C')))
as "calif"
from CCTCUENT as CUENTA where CUENTA.siscod = '01' and CUENTA.baja = 0 and CUENTA.ctacod = '[__ctacod__]'
